rationale: Educ. Code §29.903 governs CPR and AED instruction donations to school districts. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district may accept from the agency donations the agency receives under Section 7.026 for use in providing instruction to students in the principles and techniques of CPR and the use of an AED.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
